technicalSEO.title: Double Sided Banners | Print on Two Sides | Banners.com
technicalSEO.metaDescription: Stand out with double sided banners from Banners.com. Our custom printed double-sided banners ensure visibility from every angle at events or storefronts.

Custom Double-Sided Banners for Indoor & Outdoor Advertising

Durable Dual-Side Vinyl Banners for Maximum Visibility & Custom Printing

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size (H x W): Quantity: Banner Material Selection Finishing Options Production Time Design Method PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Double-Sided Banners for High-Traffic Advertising

Double your exposure with double-sided banners from Banners.com. Perfect for ensuring your message is seen from every angle, these banners offer visibility in multiple directions, ideal for high-traffic areas. Think street advertising, event signage, and storefronts, double-sided banners maximize exposure and attract attention from multiple directions.

Our double-sided banners are available in multiple materials, such as 13 oz premium matte, 13 oz premium gloss, and our 18 oz heavy-duty material. We assemble our double-sided banners by printing two separate banners and heat-welding them together to ensure the proper strength and clarity for your banner. We also place grommets every 2-4 feet around the perimeter to ensure a secure yet simple hanging process.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Double-Sided Banner Materials for Outdoor Durability

Made from premium vinyl, our double-sided banners are designed for durability and feature double-sided printing that prevents bleed-through and maintains clarity on both sides. Double sided banners are two separate banners that are hemmed and put together back-to-back. They are adhered using heat and grommets. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

Double-sided banners are rated for indoor and outdoor use and can be printed up to 6' by 30'. They are printed in full color.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application.

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.
13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high end look.
18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy duty matte 18oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.

Click here to request a sample packet of materials

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Double-Sided Banner Installation

Available with reinforced hems, grommets, and pole pockets, our double-sided banners are designed for secure installation. Learn more about banner finishing options and grommets.

  • Hems & Grommets
  • Hems Only
  • 2" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner. Pole pockets can either be 2", 3" or 4". We don't recommend having any text or images within 3 inches of the edge of the banner when you select pole pockets.

**Pole Pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners. Reinforced corners are not available on banners under 2 feet in height.

We can finish 2 sided banners up to 150 square feet. For anything larger, please contact us. Double sided banners can only have pole pockets or hems and grommet finishing.

We do not recommend wind slits in banners, therefore we do not offer them. For more information as to why, visit our wind slits page.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Double-Sided Banner Production Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you're not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases. Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information.
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment & Ordering Options for Double-Sided Banners

All double-sided banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Double-Sided Banner Orders

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.

International shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial to the customer's experience based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )
Three Day ( 3 Business Days )
Two Day ( 2 Business Days )
Overnight ( 1 Business Day )
UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping, please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5–10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Common Uses for Double-Sided Banner Advertising

Double-sided banners are perfect for maximizing your advertising exposure in high-traffic locations where visibility from multiple directions is essential.

  • Street-facing storefronts - Attract customers from both directions of traffic
  • Construction site advertising - Promote services to passing pedestrians and vehicles
  • Event signage - Welcome banners visible from entrance and exit points
  • Trade show displays - Booth identification from multiple aisles
  • Real estate signs - Property information visible from both street directions
  • Festival and fair advertising - Sponsor recognition throughout event spaces
  • Political campaign signs - Candidate visibility in busy intersections
  • Grand opening announcements - Business promotion for maximum community awareness

The dual-sided design ensures your message reaches the widest possible audience, making double-sided banners an excellent investment for any advertising campaign requiring 360-degree visibility.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Double-Sided Banner Printing

The file that prints best is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Your Custom Double-Sided Banner Today

Ready to double your advertising impact? Our double-sided banners are available in multiple materials, such as 13 oz premium matte, 13 oz premium gloss, and our 18 oz heavy-duty material. We assemble our double-sided banners by printing two separate banners and heat-welding them together to ensure the proper strength and clarity for your banner.

If you are designing a banner online or uploading your own file, the same print will appear on both sides by default. If you are looking for different graphics on each side, our graphic design team can help you customize your order.

How to Order Your Double-Sided Banner

Online Designer Create your own design using our online banner, sign and flag designer. Customize your banner with background, clipart images, text or upload your own graphics.
Upload a File Upload your ready design in formats like .eps, .ai, .pdf, or .jpg for seamless integration.
Professional Designer Collaborate with our expert design team to create a stunning banner. Share your ideas, and we'll bring them to life.
PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Double-Sided Banners

What is a double-sided (two-sided) banner?

A double-sided banner is printed on both sides so your message is readable from either direction.

How are double-sided banners made (will graphics show through)?

Double-sided banners are made as two separate vinyl banners that are hemmed and finished back-to-back, helping prevent bleed-through and keep both sides clear.

Are double-sided banners good for indoor and outdoor use?

Yes. Double-sided banners are rated for both indoor and outdoor use.

What is the maximum size you can print?

Double-sided banners can be printed up to 6' × 30'.

Are double-sided banners printed in full color?

Yes. Double-sided banners are printed in full color.

Where are your double-sided banners made?

All double-sided banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.

What material options are available for double-sided banners?

You can choose from 13 oz matte vinyl, 13 oz gloss vinyl, or 18 oz vinyl.

What's the difference between 13 oz matte, 13 oz gloss, and 18 oz vinyl?

13 oz matte vinyl is a low-shine and popular option with a rich color gamut. 13 oz gloss vinyl offers a higher shine for vibrant, crisp graphics. 18 oz vinyl is an extra heavy-duty matte option with a blockout coating for added durability and print quality.

What finishing options are available?

Double-sided banners are available with hems & grommets, hems only, or pole pockets (2", 3", or 4").

What pole size fits each pole pocket?

A 2" pole pocket fits a 3/4" diameter pole, a 3" pole pocket fits a 1 1/4" diameter pole, and a 4" pole pocket fits a 1 1/2" diameter pole.

Do pole pockets change the finished banner size?

No. Selecting pole pockets does not increase the finished size of your banner.

How close can text or logos be to the edge with pole pockets?

For best results, avoid placing text or important images within 3 inches of the edge when selecting pole pockets.

Is there a size limit for finishing double-sided banners?

We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. For larger sizes, please contact customer service.

Do you offer wind slits?

No. Wind slits are not offered.

Can the finished size vary?

Yes. Vinyl is temperature sensitive, so size can fluctuate due to printing, finishing, and climate conditions. Acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (for example, a 5' banner may vary by up to 2.5").

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
